notes: One entry per (item_code, shop) pair. The newest observation in `observations` is what the UI displays; history is appended, never overwritten. Each observation carries a `technique` (jsonld | opengraph | affiliate-api | manual) per SL-9.e. Refresh via tools/refresh_prices.py or the refresh-prices GitHub Action. Only add entries whose `url` points at a concrete product page — the refresh tool skips listing / search / category URLs by design (see SL-9.b).
